name: @yakcc-bench/b2-bloat
description: B2 — Bloat reduction benchmark: transitive dependency weight of Yakcc-compiled JSON Schema 2020-12 validator vs ajv@8.x.
notes: This package.json is NOT in the pnpm workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml only includes packages/* and examples/*).
esbuild and ajv are bench-local deps — they MUST NOT appear in the root package.json.
Install bench deps: pnpm --dir bench/B2-bloat install
Dry-run mode works without install (harness + test suite load only). Run pnpm bench:bloat:dry from root.
Live run requires pnpm --dir bench/B2-bloat install to pull esbuild and ajv for size comparison.
